headline: Vistra to Report First Quarter Results on May 7, 2026
summary: Vistra (NYSE: VST) plans to report its first quarter 2026 financial and operating results on Thursday, May 7, 2026, during a live conference call and webcast beginning at 10 a.m. ET (9 a.m. CT).

headline: Vistra’s New Investment Grade Status And What It Means For Valuation
summary: Vistra (NYSE:VST) has received investment-grade credit ratings from both Fitch Ratings and S&P. The dual upgrades mark a change in the company’s assessed credit quality and financial position. This shift may affect Vistra’s financing costs, access to capital and appeal to institutional investors. Vistra comes into this ratings upgrade with a share price of $150.33 and a very large 3 year return, alongside a 1 year return of 23.6%. Recent performance has been mixed, with a 1.6% decline over...

headline: How The Vistra (VST) Investment Story Is Shifting With Meta Contracts And Gas Repricing
summary: Vistra's modeled fair value price target has been fine tuned from about US$233.29 to about US$234.26, signaling only a slight shift in the core valuation anchor that many analysts reference. This adjustment sits alongside a wave of refreshed views after new long term contracts, acquisition headlines, and updated guidance pushed firms to revisit their assumptions. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces shape the evolving analyst narrative and what to watch to stay on top of...
